item.title: So called "Alpha males" really should watch this
item.description:
Imgur please work with me and upload these on the website in order... Part 1
part 2
part 3
Part 4 Seriously though, I enjoy stuff because I enjoy it. I don't need some fake alpha telling me that something I enjoy makes me less of a man because this dude doesn't enjoy complex flavors. GTFO with that! Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fj1iTq45n0I

item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Downvote my butt to the bottom it’s all good! I’ve been scared to post for years and I’m finally trying to put myself out there.
item.description:
You can choose any root veggies with any combo of spices! I feel satiated and full thru the day when I get a hardy carb and protein full break/brunch. Cooking a meal for an hour is a luxury and I don’t get it often but when there’s a weekend off I’m cheffin it up for my own therapy! Keep your poop regular people. What’s your favorite breakfast food?
Doggo tax ^Edit^ cheesing hard at all the lovely comments.. Thanks for that y’all! If you make the dish, add extra love for yourself and your loved ones :)
item.dc:creator: BananaBoyTings

item.title: We did a thing!
item.description: My wife and I managed to buy a home. As a millennial I can honestly say I did not think that would ever happen. It took hard work and a lot of luck to work out, but I can finally say I'm a home owner. Managed to do it just before I turned 40.
item.dc:creator: jesterablaze

item.title: Just to be perfectly clear
item.description: There are exactly 289 days until Decision 2024 and there is lot's to be done! First things first .... register to vote / check your registration ... vote.org Secondly get involved, here are some handy links https://runforsomething.net/run/candidate-support-system/ https://www.turnoutpac.org/ https://justicedemocrats.com/ https://ballotpedia.org/Election_results,_2022:_Uncontested_races_by_state Why: https://www.axios.com/2023/11/13/trump-loyalists-2024-presidential-election EVERYTHING IS ON THE LINE!

item.title: Always remember, the system is designed to squeeze everything it can out of you while giving you as little as possible. Sometimes nothing. Demand better in all facets of life.
item.description: Don't meekly accept the world as it is. Fight for a better society that treats people better. That cares more. That does more for them. Whether at your job, your voting booth, or with the people are you, create a better world. And always be in solidarity with the people who want to make a better world. The strikers who are against unfair working conditions, the reformers, the activists trying to prevent or relieve suffering. Acting together makes it better for everyone. Refusing to do that makes it continue.
item.dc:creator: politicalwanderer

item.title: Working class know how to fix national debt ...
item.dc:creator: codehunter

item.title: Same thing with the homeless, or the downtrodden. Some of them are veterans, some of them come from broken homes, some of them are in exile, and some with varying other reasons. I wish I had this wisdom and empathy when I was young.

item.dc:creator: ThisIsMyFunUsername

item.title: Images of Note: mand in china
item.description:
nyoom
WOBBLE
The amount of "Brits Furious at having to use the foreign passport line" stories in pro brexit newspapers is fucking ironic.
UwU
you joke but my city is gonna be hit by 32 mph winds (not gusts, average wind speeds). Pray to Satan for me.
It's also funny how later Teen Titans have Dick as Nightwing and Damian as Robin and he's all "guise this is my little Brother. He's ultra intense and where my Dad put all his detective skills".
This is what Job Interviews were like too.
0w0
This is what confuses me, even when you politely say "no thanks I'm gay" they somehow think calling you a relentless cockwhore is somehow going to get them laid.
People have been saying this about my generation when we were kids, now we're like this to our own kids.
vegan food made right can be good. Look at me in the eyes and tell me Gnocci and Chickpeas don't absolutely slap.
Gay? No. Bi? Yes. Disaster? Absolutely.
Diogenes is the patron saint of Chaotic Academia.
As someone who loves narrow gauge trains this is horrifically accurate, BUT AT LEAST WE'RE NOT DIESEL FANS!
Brap
The only thing that would make this perfect is if the distance reduced by 100m a second.
WHO GAVE PINKIE MONSTER
btw if you think "polyamory will save your marriage so lets look for lesbians on Tinder", please don't. It won't save your marriage. Most poly people I know do not have failing marriages.
Also my sibling in sin, it's a football match and it's an amber weather alert, we're not fighting Nazis.
This is why I turn my lights purple after dinner.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.description: Gotta pick right when they're over easy, or you can't dunk your toast plant in 'em.

item.title: Cancer vaccine? This could literally be a miracle, yet might take years to come out. Patients with no other options should be given emergency access, similar to the early Covid vaccine
item.description: They need $100M for the next phase which they're having trouble raising. How bout forcing big pharma to underwrite it?? https://news.yahoo.com/cancer-vaccine-minimal-side-effects-101124156.html
